mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, name, created_at, updated_at FROM `user` ORDER BY id

SELECT id, username, email, name, created_at, updated_at FROM `user`
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` (username, email, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{name}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
